## 2024-05-23 - Lossless WebP Metadata Stripping (C2PA)

**Learning:** WebP images generated by certain modern tools (like AI generators) can contain significant "Content Provenance" (C2PA) metadata chunks. In this case, it accounted for ~140KB (28.5%) of the total file size. Standard optimization tools might re-encode the image (potentially losing quality) or fail to remove these specific RIFF chunks.

**Action:** When optimizing documentation assets, check for large non-visual RIFF chunks. These can be stripped manually at the byte level to achieve significant size reductions while remaining 100% lossless, as it avoids touching the actual image bitstream (VP8/VP8L).
